# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it by [opening an issue](https://github.com/KooshaPari/heliosApp/issues/new?labels=security).

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| x.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Security Updates

Security updates are released as patch versions.
